name: Plasma Blob
css:
.demo-pblob { width: 32px; height: 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-primary), var(--color-success)); animation: dpblob 3.0s ease-in-out var(--loader-cycles); filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)); }
@keyframes dpblob { 0%, 100% { border-radius: 42% 58% 70% 30% / 45% 45% 55% 55%; transform: rotate(0deg); } 33% { border-radius: 70% 30% 52% 48% / 60% 40% 60% 40%; transform: rotate(120deg); } 66% { border-radius: 50% 50% 30% 70% / 40% 60% 30% 70%; transform: rotate(240deg); } }
